## Server ID
<!-- e.g. @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem or smithery/exa -->

## What you did
```
call("tool_name", arguments={...})
# or
shapeshift("server-id")
```

## Error / unexpected output
```
paste the exact error or output here
```

## Expected behavior
<!-- What did you expect to happen? -->

## Environment
- Python version: `python --version`
- Kitsune version: `pip show kitsune-mcp`
- OS: macOS / Linux / Windows
- SMITHERY_API_KEY set: yes / no
- Profile: lean (default) / forge (`KITSUNE_TOOLS=all`)
